name: th06
game: Touhou Koumakyou ~ the Embodiment of Scarlet Devil

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: mode
options.description:
Which mode you are playing on.
Practice Mode: You need to unlock the stage in order to progress.
Normal Mode - Dynamic: The resources are only given at Stage 1. Add 3 Continues to the Item Pools
                       Restriction in life, bomb or difficulty for stages 3/4 and 5/6 and character are the only logical gate
                       The difficulty is dynamic, meaning that choosing a difficulty at the start doesn't change the one that you will get and will always be set to the lowest unlocked
                       Easy difficulty is not available in this mode as it stop at the stage 5
Normal Mode - Static: Same as above but the difficulty is static. Note that you will still be unable to get to the stage 6 if you choose Easy difficulty

options.name: stage_unlock
options.description:
How the stage unlock are grouped in Practice mode and for the Extra Stage if it's apart
Global: No group
By Character: Stage group by character
By Shot Type: Stage group by shot type
If there is no check by shot type or by difficulty, the option 'By Shot Type' will act as 'By Character' since there is no enough location otherwise.
Furthermore, 3 out of the 5 '+25 Power Point' are removed when there is the minimum amount of location

options.name: exclude_lunatic
options.description: If the Lunatic difficulty is excluded

options.name: number_life_mid
options.display_name: Number of life expected in order to face Meiling and Patchouli
options.description: Number of life the randomizer expect you to have before facing Meiling and Patchouli

options.name: number_bomb_mid
options.display_name: Number of bombs expected in order to face Meiling and Patchouli
options.description: Number of bombs the randomizer expect you to have before facing Meiling and Patchouli

options.name: difficulty_mid
options.display_name: Difficulty in order to face Meiling and Patchouli
options.description: The difficulty expected in order to face Meiling and Patchouli (Starting from Lunatic and got to Easy)

options.name: number_life_end
options.display_name: Number of life expected in order to face Remilia and Sakuya
options.description: Number of life the randomizer expect you to have before facing Remilia and Sakuya

options.name: number_bomb_end
options.display_name: Number of bombs expected in order to face Remilia and Sakuya
options.description: Number of bombs the randomizer expect you to have before facing Remilia and Sakuya

options.name: difficulty_end
options.display_name: Difficulty in order to face Remilia and Sakuya
options.description: The difficulty expected in order to face Remilia and Sakuya (Starting from Lunatic and got to Easy)

options.name: extra_stage
options.display_name: Determine if the extra stage is included
options.description:
Determine if the extra stage is included
Linear: The extra stage is considered as the 7th stage
Apart: The extra stage has it's own item fo it to be unlocked
This option will follow the rule of how the stage are unlocked in Practice Mode (Global, By Character or By Shot Type)

options.name: number_life_extra
options.display_name: Number of life expected in order to face Flandre
options.description: Number of life the randomizer expect you to have before facing Flandre

options.name: number_bomb_extra
options.display_name: Number of bombs expected in order to face Flandre
options.description: Number of bombs the randomizer expect you to have before facing Flandre

options.name: shot_type
options.description: "If each shot type have their own check and are not just separated by character

options.name: difficulty_check
options.description: If checks are separated by difficulty.

options.name: check_multiple_difficulty
options.description: For difficulty check, choose if the check of the highest difficulty include the check of the lower difficulties that are unlocked. Can be changed later.

options.name: goal
options.description: If the Extra Stage is included, determine which boss is the goal.

options.name: ending_required
options.display_name: How many time do you need to beat the required boss
options.description:
How many time do you need to beat the required boss.
All Shot Type is only available when check by shot type are enabled. Itt will default to Both Character if it's not the case

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too. Can be changed later.

options.name: death_link_trigger
options.description:
When does a death link is triggerd. Can be changed later.
Life: Send a death link when losing a life
Game Over: Send a death link when getting a game over

options.name: death_link_amnesty
options.description: Number of death before sending a DeathLink. Can be changed later.

options.name: ring_link
options.description: Whether your in-level Power Point gain/loss is linked to other players. Can be changed later.

options.name: limit_lives
options.description: Limit on the maximum number of lives you can have. It only apply on the client, not on the item pool or logic. Can be changed later.

options.name: limit_bombs
options.description: Limit on the maximum number of bombs you can have. It only apply on the client, not on the item pool generation or logic. Can be changed later

options.name: traps
options.display_name: Percentage of fillers that are traps
options.description: Percentage of fillers that are traps

options.name: max_rank_trap
options.description:
Weight of the max rank trap.
This trap max out the rank difficulty (32)

options.name: power_point_trap
options.description:
Weight of the -50% power point trap.
This trap reduce the power point by 50%

options.name: bomb_trap
options.description:
Weight of the -1 bomb trap.
This trap remove 1 bomb

options.name: life_trap
options.description:
Weight of the -1 life trap.
This trap remove 1 life

options.name: no_focus_trap
options.description:
Weight of the no focus trap.
This trap remove the focus ability

options.name: reverse_movement_trap
options.description:
Weight of the Reverse Movement trap.
This trap reverse the movement of the player

options.name: aya_speed_trap
options.description:
Weight of the Aya speed trap.
This trap make the speed of the player more extreme (faster normally, slower focus)

options.name: freeze_trap
options.description:
Weight of the freeze trap.
This trap freeze the player for a short amount of time

options.name: power_point_drain_trap
options.description:
Weight of the power point drain trap.
This trap drain the power point of the player (1 power point per second)

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
